economic_notes: GBEs include Black Lake Ventures Ltd, Black Lake Ventures Limited Partnership, Elizabeth Falls Hydro Corporation, Elizabeth Falls Hydro Limited Partnership, and Black Lake Development Corporation. Equity pickup from GBEs was $2,885,963. Nation is member of PAGC, ADCFS, AHA, AERC, ADEA, ADNLC, and Ya'thi Nene.
notes: Province is Saskatchewan (SK), not AB. Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Black Lake Ventures LP (99.99%), Black Lake Ventures Ltd (100%), Elizabeth Falls Hydro Corporation (100%), Elizabeth Falls Hydro Limited Partnership (99.99%), Black Lake Development Corporation (100%). Restricted cash includes both general restricted cash ($5,596,784) and CMHC restricted cash ($1,049,003) totalling $6,645,787. Long-term debt includes current and non-current portions of both long-term debt ($548,035 + $495,497 = $1,043,532) and CMHC mortgages ($484,690 + $4,962,032 = $5,446,722). Annual debt service calculated as LTD repayment $546,241 + CMHC repayment $458,292 = $1,004,533. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $24,096,629 + AHA $1,760,316 + CMHC $656,936 + Trust funds $8,375 + PAGC $2,480,603 + NLCDC $116,221 + net deferred revenue movement $1,226 = approximately $30,121,193 excluding FNT and IBA which may be partially own-source. First Nations Trust and IBA treated as own-source for OSR calculation. Financial statements signed October 31, 2024; audit report dated November 4, 2024.
